query:
SELECT l.name as liga, COUNT(t.id) as total_times 
FROM teams t 
JOIN leagues l ON t.leagueId = l.id 
WHERE t.countryId = 30001 
GROUP BY l.id, l.name 
ORDER BY l.division;
